# Support

For questions regarding validation workflows, release processing, or the status of a data submission, please contact the [HTAN Help Desk](https://sagebionetworks.jira.com/servicedesk/customer/portal/1).

For metadata requirements and submission standards, please refer to the [HTAN Phase 2 Data Model](https://htan2-data-model.readthedocs.io/en/main/index.html) documentation.

When submitting a support request, please include the following information when applicable:

- Relevant HTAN center or project
- Associated file or record Synapse identifiers
- Submission or release date

Documentation issues, bugs, and feature requests may also be reported through the Help Desk.
